case_title: JULIE LONG VS. MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LONG, JULIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION INC. $3,753.75 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,838.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LONG, JULIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2014 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JULIE LONG APPEARS; NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,316.82 FILED BY LONG, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION INC.
